summary: Dependabot updater exited with an error because it recorded a 'security_update_not_needed' condition for the dependency 'rand', and the updater container failed with exit code 1 while running the update_files command.
root_cause: The Dependabot updater recorded an error of type 'security_update_not_needed' for dependency 'rand' (no security update needed) and then the updater container failed with exit code 1 when running "$DEPENDABOT_HOME/dependabot-updater/bin/run update_files".

evidence.quote: Dependabot encountered '1' error(s) during execution, please check the logs for more details.
evidence.reason: Shows Dependabot reported an error during the update run.
The errors table lists an error with type 'security_update_not_needed'.
Identifies the dependency ('rand') associated with the 'security_update_not_needed' error.

evidence.quote: no security update needed as rand is no longer vulnerable
evidence.reason: Updater log explicitly states that no security update was needed for rand.

evidence.quote: Failure running container 4d986eac50248057b7f3fa031163542ffb36990efbcff66eb3aed0e408c150fa: Error: Command failed with exit code 1: /bin/sh -c $DEPENDABOT_HOME/dependabot-updater/bin/run update_files
evidence.reason: The container running the updater command exited with code 1 while executing the update_files command, causing the job failure.

evidence.quote: For more information see: https://github.com/rust-lang/cargo/network/updates/1333710739 (write access to the repository is required to view the log)
evidence.reason: Provides the Dependabot run URL for detailed logs to investigate the reported error.

suggested_fix: Inspect the Dependabot run log at the provided URL and adjust the updater/config so that 'security_update_not_needed' is handled gracefully (i.e., not treated as a fatal error) or avoid running update_files when no updates are required. Alternatively, update the security-advisory data or Dependabot config for the 'rand' advisory and re-run the Dependabot job.
